label: Kummer theory
evidence: Mathlib/FieldTheory/KummerExtension (38 decls) formalizes Kummer extensions of fields — the standard formal home of Kummer theory.

label: homology theory
evidence: Mathlib/Algebra/Homology (6140 decls) is the dedicated homological-algebra folder (complexes, homology, exactness) — core home of homology theory.

label: convex geometry
evidence: Mathlib/Analysis/Convex (1920 decls) holds convex sets, hulls, functions and separation theorems — the standard formal home of convex geometry.

label: convex geometry
evidence: Mathlib/Geometry/Convex (237 decls) is a smaller geometry-specific convexity folder complementing Analysis/Convex.

label: birational geometry
evidence: Mathlib/AlgebraicGeometry/RationalMap (77 decls) formalizes rational maps between schemes, the core object of birational geometry, though the field is broader than this one folder.

label: nonlinear dynamics
evidence: Mathlib/Dynamics (800 decls) covers flows, fixed points, ergodic theory and periodic points for general (not just linear) dynamical systems.
